reachability.evidence: Anonymous GET /Public/SHIPS/* returns HTTP 200 with WebLogin form body. Login flow has Cloudflare Turnstile (hfTurnstileToken). Authenticated cookie session captured via HAR shows direct GET access to /Public/SHIPS/ShipDetails.aspx?IMONumber=... once cookies present.
reachability.probe_classification: Login wall + Turnstile-gated; cookie-replay viable after one-time interactive login via press-auth companion (controlled Chrome).

endpoint_clusters.notes: Detail page; query string IMONumber=<imo>. Returns HTML particulars page.
Search form landing. POST is ASP.NET __VIEWSTATE postback for name-search and grid interactions; v1 only uses GET for session-liveness ping.

auth.notes: Programmatic login blocked by Turnstile. Use press-auth companion for one-time controlled-Chrome capture.
